model.sql:
WITH g4a_row_number_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts DESC, record_id ASC
  ) AS row_number_in_business_key
FROM g4a_row_number_source

WITH g4b_rank_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY metric_value DESC, event_ts DESC, record_id ASC
  ) AS metric_rank_in_business_key
FROM g4b_rank_source

WITH g4c_dense_rank_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY metric_value DESC, event_ts DESC, record_id ASC
  ) AS dense_metric_rank_in_business_key
FROM g4c_dense_rank_source

WITH g4d_lead_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  LEAD(metric_value, 1, 0.0) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
  ) AS next_metric_value
FROM g4d_lead_source

WITH g4e_lag_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  LAG(metric_value, 1, 0.0) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
  ) AS previous_metric_value
FROM g4e_lag_source

WITH g4f_first_value_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  FIRST_VALUE(metric_value, TRUE) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
  ) AS first_metric_value_in_business_key
FROM g4f_first_value_source

WITH g4g_last_value_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  LAST_VALUE(metric_value, TRUE) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
  ) AS last_metric_value_in_business_key
FROM g4g_last_value_source

WITH g4h_nth_value_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  NTH_VALUE(metric_value, 3) IGNORE NULLS OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
  ) AS third_metric_value_in_business_key
FROM g4h_nth_value_source

WITH g4i_ntile_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  NTILE(4) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY metric_value DESC, event_ts DESC, record_id ASC
  ) AS metric_quartile_in_business_key
FROM g4i_ntile_source

WITH g4j_percent_rank_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  PERCENT_RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY metric_value ASC, event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
  ) AS metric_percent_rank_in_business_key
FROM g4j_percent_rank_source

WITH g4k_cume_dist_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  CUME_DIST() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY metric_value ASC, event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
  ) AS metric_cumulative_distribution_in_business_key
FROM g4k_cume_dist_source

WITH g4l_window_frame_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  AVG(metric_value) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
    ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING
  ) AS centered_five_row_average
FROM g4l_window_frame_source

WITH g4m_running_total_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  SUM(metric_value) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS running_metric_value
FROM g4m_running_total_source

WITH g4n_moving_average_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  AVG(metric_value) OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts ASC, record_id ASC
    ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS trailing_seven_row_average
FROM g4n_moving_average_source

WITH g4o_asof_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    snapshot_date,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<snapshot_table_name>') }}
),
g4o_asof_parameters AS (
  SELECT
    CAST('<as_of_date>' AS DATE) AS as_of_date
),
g4o_current_snapshot AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    snapshot_date,
    metric_value
  FROM g4o_asof_source
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC
  ) = 1
),
g4o_historical_snapshot AS (
  SELECT
    source_rows.business_key,
    source_rows.snapshot_date,
    source_rows.metric_value
  FROM g4o_asof_source AS source_rows
  CROSS JOIN g4o_asof_parameters AS parameters
  WHERE source_rows.snapshot_date <= parameters.as_of_date
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY source_rows.business_key
    ORDER BY source_rows.snapshot_date DESC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  current_snapshot.business_key,
  current_snapshot.snapshot_date AS current_snapshot_date,
  current_snapshot.metric_value AS current_metric_value,
  historical_snapshot.snapshot_date AS as_of_snapshot_date,
  historical_snapshot.metric_value AS metric_value_as_of_date,
  current_snapshot.metric_value - historical_snapshot.metric_value AS change_since_as_of_date
FROM g4o_current_snapshot AS current_snapshot
LEFT JOIN g4o_historical_snapshot AS historical_snapshot
  ON current_snapshot.business_key = historical_snapshot.business_key

WITH g4p_grouping_sets_source AS (
  SELECT
    region_name,
    product_category,
    channel_name,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<sales_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  product_category,
  channel_name,
  SUM(net_sales_amount) AS total_net_sales_amount
FROM g4p_grouping_sets_source
GROUP BY GROUPING SETS (
  (region_name, product_category, channel_name),
  (region_name, product_category),
  (region_name),
  ()
)

WITH g4q_rollup_source AS (
  SELECT
    region_name,
    product_category,
    channel_name,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<sales_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  product_category,
  channel_name,
  SUM(net_sales_amount) AS total_net_sales_amount
FROM g4q_rollup_source
GROUP BY ROLLUP(region_name, product_category, channel_name)

WITH g4r_cube_source AS (
  SELECT
    region_name,
    product_category,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<sales_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  product_category,
  SUM(net_sales_amount) AS total_net_sales_amount
FROM g4r_cube_source
GROUP BY CUBE(region_name, product_category)

WITH g4s_grouping_source AS (
  SELECT
    region_name,
    product_category,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<sales_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  product_category,
  SUM(net_sales_amount) AS total_net_sales_amount,
  GROUPING(region_name) AS is_region_subtotal,
  GROUPING(product_category) AS is_product_category_subtotal
FROM g4s_grouping_source
GROUP BY ROLLUP(region_name, product_category)

WITH g4t_grouping_id_source AS (
  SELECT
    region_name,
    product_category,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<sales_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  product_category,
  SUM(net_sales_amount) AS total_net_sales_amount,
  GROUPING_ID(region_name, product_category) AS grouping_level_id
FROM g4t_grouping_id_source
GROUP BY CUBE(region_name, product_category)

WITH g4u_conditional_aggregate_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    customer_id,
    order_status,
    order_channel,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<orders_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  customer_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'COMPLETE' THEN net_sales_amount ELSE 0 END) AS completed_net_sales_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN net_sales_amount ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_net_sales_amount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN order_channel = 'ONLINE' THEN order_id END) AS online_order_count
FROM g4u_conditional_aggregate_source
GROUP BY customer_id

WITH g4v_filter_aggregate_source AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    order_status,
    order_channel,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<orders_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  customer_id,
  SUM(net_sales_amount) FILTER (WHERE order_status = 'COMPLETE') AS completed_net_sales_amount,
  SUM(net_sales_amount) FILTER (WHERE order_status = 'CANCELLED') AS cancelled_net_sales_amount,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE order_channel = 'ONLINE') AS online_order_count
FROM g4v_filter_aggregate_source
GROUP BY customer_id

WITH g4w_within_group_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY metric_value ASC) AS p90_metric_value_continuous,
  PERCENTILE_DISC(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY metric_value ASC) AS p50_metric_value_discrete
FROM g4w_within_group_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4x_listagg_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    stage_name
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  LISTAGG(stage_name, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY stage_name ASC) AS ordered_stage_names
FROM g4x_listagg_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4y_string_agg_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    stage_name
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  STRING_AGG(stage_name, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY stage_name ASC) AS ordered_stage_names
FROM g4y_string_agg_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4z_exact_percentile_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  PERCENTILE(metric_value, 0.50) AS p50_exact_value,
  PERCENTILE(metric_value, 0.90) AS p90_exact_value,
  PERCENTILE(metric_value, 0.99) AS p99_exact_value
FROM g4z_exact_percentile_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4aa_approx_percentile_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  APPROX_PERCENTILE(metric_value, 0.50, 10000) AS p50_approx_value,
  APPROX_PERCENTILE(metric_value, 0.90, 10000) AS p90_approx_value,
  APPROX_PERCENTILE(metric_value, 0.99, 10000) AS p99_approx_value
FROM g4aa_approx_percentile_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4ab_median_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  MEDIAN(metric_value) AS median_metric_value
FROM g4ab_median_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4ac_array_agg_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    stage_name
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT stage_name) AS distinct_stage_names_array
FROM g4ac_array_agg_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4ad_collect_list_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    stage_name
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  COLLECT_LIST(stage_name) AS collected_stage_names
FROM g4ad_collect_list_source
GROUP BY business_key

WITH g4ae_hll_source AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(event_ts) AS event_date,
    customer_id
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g4ae_daily_sketches AS (
  SELECT
    event_date,
    HLL_SKETCH_AGG(customer_id) AS customer_id_hll_sketch
  FROM g4ae_hll_source
  GROUP BY event_date
)
SELECT
  event_date,
  customer_id_hll_sketch,
  HLL_SKETCH_ESTIMATE(customer_id_hll_sketch) AS approximate_distinct_customer_count
FROM g4ae_daily_sketches

WITH g4af_approx_top_k_source AS (
  SELECT
    segment_name,
    search_term
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  segment_name,
  APPROX_TOP_K(search_term, 5, 10000) AS approximate_top_search_terms
FROM g4af_approx_top_k_source
GROUP BY segment_name

WITH g4ag_gap_island_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_date
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g4ag_distinct_dates AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    business_key,
    event_date
  FROM g4ag_gap_island_source
),
g4ag_sequenced_dates AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY business_key
      ORDER BY event_date ASC
    ) AS event_date_sequence
  FROM g4ag_distinct_dates
),
g4ag_anchored_dates AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_date,
    DATE_SUB(event_date, CAST(event_date_sequence AS INT)) AS island_anchor_date
  FROM g4ag_sequenced_dates
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  MIN(event_date) AS island_start_date,
  MAX(event_date) AS island_end_date,
  COUNT(*) AS island_length_in_days
FROM g4ag_anchored_dates
GROUP BY business_key, island_anchor_date

WITH g4ah_session_source AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g4ah_with_previous_event AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    event_ts,
    LAG(event_ts) OVER (
      PARTITION BY user_id
      ORDER BY event_ts ASC
    ) AS previous_event_ts
  FROM g4ah_session_source
),
g4ah_session_flags AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    event_ts,
    CASE
      WHEN previous_event_ts IS NULL THEN 1
      WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, previous_event_ts, event_ts) > <session_gap_minutes> THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_new_session
  FROM g4ah_with_previous_event
),
g4ah_session_numbers AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    event_ts,
    SUM(is_new_session) OVER (
      PARTITION BY user_id
      ORDER BY event_ts ASC
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS session_number
  FROM g4ah_session_flags
)
SELECT
  user_id,
  session_number,
  MIN(event_ts) AS session_start_ts,
  MAX(event_ts) AS session_end_ts,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count_in_session
FROM g4ah_session_numbers
GROUP BY user_id, session_number

WITH g4ai_funnel_source AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    stage_name,
    stage_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g4ai_stage_times AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    MIN(CASE WHEN stage_name = '<stage_1_name>' THEN stage_ts END) AS stage_1_ts,
    MIN(CASE WHEN stage_name = '<stage_2_name>' THEN stage_ts END) AS stage_2_ts,
    MIN(CASE WHEN stage_name = '<stage_3_name>' THEN stage_ts END) AS stage_3_ts
  FROM g4ai_funnel_source
  GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS users_reaching_stage_1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN stage_2_ts IS NOT NULL AND stage_2_ts >= stage_1_ts THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS users_reaching_stage_2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN stage_2_ts IS NOT NULL AND stage_2_ts >= stage_1_ts AND stage_3_ts IS NOT NULL AND stage_3_ts >= stage_2_ts THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS users_reaching_stage_3
FROM g4ai_stage_times
WHERE stage_1_ts IS NOT NULL

WITH g4aj_top_n_source AS (
  SELECT
    region_name,
    product_name,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<sales_table_name>') }}
),
g4aj_aggregated_sales AS (
  SELECT
    region_name,
    product_name,
    SUM(net_sales_amount) AS total_net_sales_amount
  FROM g4aj_top_n_source
  GROUP BY region_name, product_name
)
SELECT
  region_name,
  product_name,
  total_net_sales_amount,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY region_name
    ORDER BY total_net_sales_amount DESC, product_name ASC
  ) AS sales_rank_in_region
FROM g4aj_aggregated_sales
QUALIFY DENSE_RANK() OVER (
  PARTITION BY region_name
  ORDER BY total_net_sales_amount DESC, product_name ASC
) <= <top_n>
